programs.title: Chateau DIY
programs.sub_title: Alicia and Carlton race to get wedding-ready; can they finish the loo before a couple say 'I do'? Kathryn and Steve try to make modern comfort work in a medieval setting

programs.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programs.desc: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back at how Karl and Paul revolutionised their three-bed in Leeds by spending big. But were there issues that money couldn't solve.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Nursing manager Sarah takes inspiration from her husband's Middle Eastern heritage as she serves up a Turkish menu, on an evening featuring tattoos, beauty tips and twerking.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Wannabe clairvoyant Janet hosts a ghoulish fright night full of surprises and practical jokes in her 'haunted' house. But is her food tasty or terrifying.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Record label owner Phil hosts with a 70s rock-themed menu. Can his gags and giggles make up for his disappointing dessert.

programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: Painter-decorator and Michael Bublé impersonator Alex hopes to sail to the top of the leaderboard with a cruise-themed menu from around the world.
